revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

808.title: Instantaneous sound power per unit area

revisions.*:
'''3-1-095

Instantaneous sound energy flux per unit area

The quotient of the instantaneous sound power transmitted across a surface element and the area of the surface element.


Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
